description_long: This is a low-poly, stylized orange sports car with two prominent blue racing stripes running from the hood to the trunk. The car features a wide, aggressive front grille with four round yellow headlights and a blacked-out section, along with a gold Chevrolet bowtie emblem. The side profile reveals a coupe body style with two doors, large gray wheels, and black-tinted windows. The rear of the car displays two pairs of round taillights and a white license plate with the text 'ATMTA'. The overall design is angular and simplified, with minimal surface detailing and a focus on bold color contrasts. The car's proportions and styling cues suggest inspiration from the Chevrolet Camaro.
description: A stylized orange sports coupe with blue racing stripes, black windows, and bold front and rear lighting details. The car has a low, angular profile and a distinctive Chevrolet emblem on the front.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide black grille, four round yellow headlights, blue racing stripes, and Chevrolet emblem.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the coupe shape, two doors, large gray wheels, and continuous blue stripes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays two pairs of round taillights, the blue stripes, black rear window, and a white license plate reading 'ATMTA'.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the coupe profile, two doors, gray wheels, and blue stripes.
attribute_headlight_design: Four round headlights in a dual-cluster arrangement, set within a wide black grille
